description: Create a 'Green Roof' construction for the 4StoreyBuilding model. Define three materials: 'GR-Soil-4in' (Thickness: 0.333 ft, Conductivity: 0.42, Density: 75.0, Specific Heat: 0.25), 'GR-Drainage-Mat' (Thickness: 0.042 ft, Conductivity: 0.03, Density: 2.5, Specific Heat: 0.35), and 'GR-Insulation-R20' (Thickness: 0.333 ft, Conductivity: 0.017, Density: 1.5, Specific Heat: 0.25). Combine these into a construction named 'Green-Roof-Assembly' with the layers ordered from outside to inside as listed. Assign 'Green-Roof-Assembly' to all roof surfaces in the building, run the annual simulation, and save the project.
